code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if has
      mut val = cur
      if neg
        val = -val
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, val)
      cur = 0
      has = false
      neg = false
    end
  else if b == 45 and not has
    neg = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has
  mut val = cur
  if neg
    val = -val
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, val)
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in nums
  mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in sorted
    if not inserted and x <= y
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
  end
  sorted = new_sorted
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for v in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
